title: Project Iris Event
description: This is the standard event pack for every single Project Iris Event!
body:
The Project Iris pack is the official modpack for anyone who participates in a Project Iris Event.

This is past event in the Project Iris Discord server!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CpDVFzj4BKc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- Bobby
- Appleskin
- Essential
- Simple Voice
- Mouse Tweaks
- LambDynamicLights
- Flashback


# **Purpose**
This modpack is optional for all Project Iris Events to ensure that all players have a chance at good performance, quality, and a fun time.

The other purpose was to put together this pack so players wouldn't ask the question "What version is the event?" or "I don't have a modpack, what mods do I need?".

If you're interested in being part of a community that runs Minecraft events often, then join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/mUedjdrBHQ) and come hang out with us!
